headline: A Look At Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Valuation As Earnings Optimism And Institutional Interest Build
summary: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) is back in focus after analysts highlighted projected earnings per share of US$0.57 for the upcoming quarter, along with double-digit revenue expectations and strong recent gains in commission and interest income. See our latest analysis for Interactive Brokers Group. At a share price of US$68.39, Interactive Brokers has seen a 12.79% 1 month share price pullback. However, its 1 year total shareholder return of 60.66% and roughly 3 year and 5 year total...
